title: Carry out servicing operations
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out servicing operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to conduct servicing operations

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to conduct servicing operations

elements.title: Identify lubricants and fluid leakage

pcs.text: Identify lubricants and fluids required for the job according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Handle lubricants and fluids according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Identify and report fluid leakages and component faults according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify lubricants and fluids required for the job according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Handle lubricants and fluids according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Identify and report fluid leakages and component faults according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify lubricants and fluids required for the job according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Handle lubricants and fluids according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Identify and report fluid leakages and component faults according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify lubricants and fluid leakage

elements.title: Carry out servicing activities

pcs.text: Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, 3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, 3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, 3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out servicing activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
